meta.title: Stage-1 Registered Report — On-Device Deep Mode & Emergency-Safety at Scale
meta.format: Registered Report, Stage 1 (methodology locked before data collection / model training)
meta.supersedes: PREREGISTRATION.md v1 (2026-07-11) via Amendment A1, pre-results
meta.hash_note: The SHA-256 of this file's canonical serialization (recursive key-sorted, no whitespace) is recorded in prereg/MANIFEST.sha256 and in PREREGISTRATION.md §5. Any change to this file after that hash is written invalidates the pre-registration.

frozen_kernel.posterior: Monte-Carlo over LLR uncertainty, n_mc >= 3000, mc_seed 7
frozen_kernel.tuning_prohibited: Any change to the kernel, gate discount, or band thresholds voids this pre-registration and requires a new locked spec.

mechanism_lexicons.stamping: Every verdict and certificate records mechanism_lexicon; deep-mode extraction must expose the same mechanism set so the stamp means the same thing in both modes.

split.acceptance_set: the 30% test split of each corpus, SEALED: never inspected, never in training, never in few-shot prompts, never used for checkpoint selection; scored exactly once

evasive_coercion.definition: reworded manipulation carrying a genuine mechanism (bypass, unverifiable authority, manufactured consensus, complexity-deflection, isolation) expressed WITHOUT fast-mode surface keywords

emergency.definition: legitimate urgent messages with NO manipulation mechanism, hand-labeled, high intensity
strata: sre_infrastructure_incidents (failovers, pager alerts, active ransomware mitigation)
clinical_medical_directives (triage codes, critical dosing, ER calls)
hard_deadline_administrative (compliance halts, trading freezes, statutory filings)

consumer_scam.definition: impersonation/grandparent scams, account-suspension gift-card demands, delivery-fee phishing, romance-scam openers, dark-pattern checkouts; every item carries a consumer-v1 mechanism

corpora.label_rubric: manipulative iff the message tries to override the receiver's judgement via a mechanism; legitimate-urgent iff urgency is real and verification is invited or neutral; ambiguous items dropped and logged, never guessed
corpora.freeze: corpora hashed into prereg/MANIFEST.sha256 before any model training touches them

on_device_model_constraints.checkpoint_rule: one checkpoint pre-committed using train splits only; training seeds {1,2,3} all reported, acceptance run on the pre-declared seed-1 checkpoint

claim_A_ambient_deep_mode.hypothesis: A distilled 1-3B on-device extractor feeding the unchanged posterior kernel raises evasive-coercion recall far above fast mode without sacrificing emergency-safety or clean precision.

decision.supported: A1 >= 0.70 AND A2 <= 0.02 on sealed acceptance sets
null_consequence: ambient-deep NPU claim retired (HYPOTHESIS -> RETIRED_FULLY); published as a first-class finding
HELM degrades to fast-mode + primitives (delegation table, capacity meter, certificate wallet) — still shipped
deep-mode evaluations restricted to paid cloud-escalation tiers; no unhedged on-device token-burn claims
decision.partial: A2 holds and 0.50 <= A1 < 0.70: SUPPORTED-BY-PROXY only if a cloud deep run on the same acceptance set clears 0.70; does not license the ambient on-device claim

claim_B_emergency_safety_at_scale.hypothesis: The corroboration gate's 0.50 -> 0.00 emergency false-HOLD result replicates on the powered n>=400 stratified emergency corpus, in fast mode, at deployment-grade rates.

null_consequence: ambient default-on BLOCKED (design Risk 2); HELM ships default-silent / opt-in-per-surface
the 0.00 seed number demoted in VALIDATION.md to 'seed-only, did not replicate at scale'
gate re-worked and re-passed against this same locked spec before default-on is reconsidered

analysis_plan.one_shot_acceptance: sealed 30% sets scored exactly once per engine on the pre-committed checkpoint; no checkpoint shopping
analysis_plan.reporting: per-item {id, p, ci95, verdict, mechanism_present, mechanism_lexicon} plus the corpus hash it ran on; per-class recall table; calibration (Brier, ECE-5bin) deep vs fast
analysis_plan.multiplicity: four primary endpoints, each judged against its own pre-set band; no cross-crediting
analysis_plan.amendments: dated entries in PREREGISTRATION.md §5 permitted only BEFORE results are seen; any post-results change invalidates the claim
